Customers AI · Segments
High confidence8 segments · 2,140 customersLast sync 2m ago
Going cold
98 customers need urgent re-engagement
Past the “at risk” stage and approaching permanent churn. 80% will lapse within 30 days without action — act within 7.
At risk
214 at-risk customers — $380K exposed
Outside their typical reorder window, and 68 of them are VIPs. A win-back is estimated to recover $95K.
Value drain
Discount Hunters cost $18K/mo in margin
142 promotion-only and high-return accounts repeat at near-zero full-price. Stop spending to retain them — redirect it to at-risk recovery.

View segment →

Most tools only ever praise the top spenders. Magellan shows the whole truth: the engines that fund the business, the relationships slipping past their cycle, and — the part no dashboard wants to show you — the segments that structurally lose money. A segment is defined by a behavior threshold, not a guess, so each one is an action: Protect the VIPs, Recover the slipping, and Release the drains so retention spend flows to relationships that pay it back.

Ask Magellan anything…
